raw_output:
v0.1.1 RELEASE battery re-run (Claude, Fable 5), full diff main...dev @ 203a060, detached worktree. NO NEW FINDINGS. Suites all green (real exit codes): backend pytest 567 passed (coverage 95.53%, floor 75, critical paths >=91%), mypy 0 (56 files), ruff 0; frontend cold-cache eslint 0, prettier 0, vitest 322 passed/45 files (vitest 4.1.10 per #123), build 0; playwright e2e 16 passed single clean run (#154 flake did NOT recur); npm ci 0 vulnerabilities; uv lock --check 0. Version uniform 0.1.1 (main.py, pyproject, uv.lock somnus, test_health); no app-identity 0.1.0 left. #153 (caffeine after-midnight, caffeineCalc entry times not wrapped) genuinely still present and OPEN on v0.1.2 — acceptance record correctly does not claim it fixed. #154 (e2e flake) OPEN. #155 delta (version/lock/docs) composes cleanly; acceptance #122 addition accurate; Makefile comment matches db_location.py branches.

--- Release battery note ---
v0.1.1 dev->main release, full-diff battery (163 files, main...dev). RE-RUN after release-prep #155 (version 0.1.0->0.1.1, uv.lock regenerated, doc fixes) advanced the base. Every constituent PR (#118..#155) already passed its own 4-leg battery; this is the release-level combined-state pass per the strict release-scope reading (docs/process/review-gate.md). Dispositions: caffeine after-midnight P2 = issue #153 (owner-deferred to v0.1.2); dashboard stuck-loading P2 = issue #156 (filed, non-blocking, deferred v0.1.2); caffeine bedtime-callout P2 = DISMISSED false positive (curve built via useCaffeineDecay with curveEndHour(bedtimeHour); +0.5h margin guarantees a sample past the marker; both pages wire bedtimeHour identically to hook and chart, verified). e2e flake = #154. No P1, no security finding.
